---
title: "Mortality — DEMOPAST (test)"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.4/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
---

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css" />
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/papaparse@5.4.1/papaparse.min.js"></script>

<div style="background:#fff3cd;border:1px solid #ffeeba;border-radius:4px;padding:0.5rem 1rem;margin-bottom:1rem;font-size:0.9rem;">
  <strong>Test section</strong> — preliminary data extracted from ISTAT <em>Movimento dello stato civile</em> volumes (1863–1936).
  Use the <strong>Geography</strong> toggle to switch between <em>province</em> (fine detail, boundaries
  changing over time) and <em>compartimento</em> (sum of the constituent provinces, shaded on the
  historical regional boundaries). The available years and colour scale adjust to the
  selected level; at compartimento level only crude death rate and total deaths are available.
  <a href="index.html">← back to test home</a>
</div>

<div class="slider-container">
  <label for="yearSlider" class="year-label">Year: <span id="yearDisplay">1871</span></label><br>
  <input type="range" id="yearSlider" min="0" max="6" step="1" value="0" style="width:60%;max-width:500px;">
  <div id="yearTicks" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;max-width:500px;margin:0 auto;"></div>
</div>

<div style="text-align:center;margin:1rem 0;">
  <label for="indSelect" style="font-weight:bold;">Indicator: </label>
  <select id="indSelect" style="padding:4px 8px;font-size:1rem;">
    <option value="cdr">Crude Death Rate (deaths / 1,000 pop.)</option>
    <option value="imr">Infant Mortality Rate (deaths &lt;1yr / 1,000 births)</option>
    <option value="deaths">Total deaths</option>
    <option value="e0">Life expectancy at birth, 1881 &amp; 1921 (years)</option>
  </select>
  &nbsp;&nbsp;
  <label style="font-weight:bold;">Geography: </label>
  <label style="margin-right:0.5rem;"><input type="radio" name="geoLevel" value="prov" checked> Province</label>
  <label><input type="radio" name="geoLevel" value="comp"> Compartimento</label>
  <div id="compNote" style="display:none;font-size:0.82rem;color:#777;margin-top:0.35rem;">
    At compartimento level only Crude Death Rate and Total deaths are available
    (infant mortality, life expectancy and the age–sex pyramid remain provincial).
  </div>
  <div id="compSexWrap" style="display:none;margin-top:0.45rem;">
    <label style="font-weight:bold;font-size:0.9rem;">Sex (life tables): </label>
    <label style="margin-right:0.4rem;"><input type="radio" name="compSex" value="T" checked> Total</label>
    <label style="margin-right:0.4rem;"><input type="radio" name="compSex" value="M"> Males</label>
    <label><input type="radio" name="compSex" value="F"> Females</label>
  </div>
</div>

<div style="display:flex;gap:1.5rem;align-items:flex-start;">
  <div style="flex:0 0 38%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.75rem;">
    <div id="map" style="width:100%;height:560px;"></div>
    <div id="legendWrapper">
      <div class="legend-header">
        <span class="legend-title">Legend</span>
        <button id="legendToggle" type="button">Hide</button>
      </div>
      <div id="legendContent" class="map-legend"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="provinceInfo" style="flex:0 0 59%;padding:1rem;background:#f8f9fa;border-radius:4px;display:none;max-height:780px;overflow-y:auto;">
    <h4 id="provName" style="margin-top:0;"></h4>

    <h5 style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Mortality indicators</h5>
    <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.9rem;">
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Crude Death Rate (‰)</td><td id="provCDR" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Infant Mortality Rate (‰)</td><td id="provIMR" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Total deaths</td><td id="provDeaths" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
      <tr><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Life expectancy at birth (years)</td><td id="provE0" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
    </table>

    <h5 style="margin-top:1rem;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Infant Mortality Rate over time</h5>
    <div><canvas id="imrChart" style="max-height:220px;"></canvas></div>

    <h5 style="margin-top:1rem;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Deaths by age and sex <span id="pyramidYearNote" style="font-weight:normal;color:#777;font-size:0.85rem;"></span></h5>
    <div><canvas id="pyramidChart"></canvas></div>

    <div id="ltCompBlock" style="display:none;margin-top:1rem;">
      <div id="ltCompNoData" style="display:none;font-size:0.9rem;color:#777;padding:0.5rem 0;">
        Life-table data not available for this compartimento and year.
      </div>
      <div id="ltCompCharts">
        <div><canvas id="survivalChart" style="max-height:260px;"></canvas></div>
        <div style="margin-top:1rem;"><canvas id="mxChart" style="max-height:260px;"></canvas></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="margin-top:0.75rem;font-size:0.9rem;">
      <a href="../data/mortality/mortality_panel.csv" download>mortality_panel.csv</a> ·
      <a href="../data/mortality/mortality_comp.csv" download>mortality_comp.csv</a> ·
      <a href="../data/mortality/imr_annual.csv" download>imr_annual.csv</a> ·
      <a href="../data/mortality/lifetables_1881.csv" download>lifetables_1881.csv</a> ·
    <a href="../data/mortality/lifetables_1921.csv" download>lifetables_1921.csv</a> ·
    <a href="../data/mortality/lifetables_comp.csv" download>lifetables_comp.csv</a> ·
    <a href="../data/mortality/e0_comp.csv" download>e0_comp.csv</a> ·
    <a href="../data/mortality/mortality_1951_1961.csv" download>mortality_1951_1961.csv</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const COUNT_FIELD = 'deaths';
const RATE_FIELD = 'cdr';
const GEO_AVAILABLE = [1861, 1871, 1881, 1901, 1911, 1921, 1931, 1936];
// years for which a real compartimento (region) geojson exists
const COMP_GEO_YEARS = [1871, 1881, 1901, 1911, 1921, 1931, 1936];
const COLORS = ['#fff5f0','#fee0d2','#fcbba1','#fc9272','#fb6a4a','#ef3b2c','#cb181d','#99000d'];
// breaks are pinned to the first year in which the indicator is observed (province level)
const FIELD_BASE_YEAR = {cdr: 1871, imr: 1871, deaths: 1871, e0: 1881};
const COMP_FIELDS = ['cdr', 'deaths'];   // indicators available at compartimento level

// COD_PROV -> compartimento (geography stable across years)
const PROV_COMP = {1:"PIEMONTE", 2:"PIEMONTE", 3:"PIEMONTE", 4:"PIEMONTE", 5:"PIEMONTE", 6:"PIEMONTE", 7:"PIEMONTE", 8:"LIGURIA", 9:"LIGURIA", 10:"LIGURIA", 11:"LIGURIA", 12:"LOMBARDIA", 13:"LOMBARDIA", 14:"LOMBARDIA", 15:"LOMBARDIA", 16:"LOMBARDIA", 17:"LOMBARDIA", 18:"LOMBARDIA", 19:"LOMBARDIA", 20:"LOMBARDIA", 21:"VENEZIA TRIDENTINA", 22:"VENEZIA TRIDENTINA", 23:"VENETO", 24:"VENETO", 25:"VENETO", 26:"VENETO", 27:"VENETO", 28:"VENETO", 29:"VENETO", 30:"VENETO", 31:"VENEZIA GIULIA E ZARA", 32:"VENEZIA GIULIA E ZARA", 33:"EMILIA", 34:"EMILIA", 35:"EMILIA", 36:"EMILIA", 37:"EMILIA", 38:"EMILIA", 39:"EMILIA", 40:"EMILIA", 41:"MARCHE", 42:"MARCHE", 43:"MARCHE", 44:"MARCHE", 45:"TOSCANA", 46:"TOSCANA", 47:"TOSCANA", 48:"TOSCANA", 49:"TOSCANA", 50:"TOSCANA", 51:"TOSCANA", 52:"TOSCANA", 53:"TOSCANA", 54:"UMBRIA", 55:"UMBRIA", 56:"LAZIO", 57:"LAZIO", 58:"LAZIO", 59:"LAZIO", 60:"LAZIO", 61:"CAMPANIA", 62:"CAMPANIA", 63:"CAMPANIA", 64:"CAMPANIA", 65:"CAMPANIA", 66:"ABRUZZI E MOLISE", 67:"ABRUZZI E MOLISE", 68:"ABRUZZI E MOLISE", 69:"ABRUZZI E MOLISE", 70:"ABRUZZI E MOLISE", 71:"PUGLIE", 72:"PUGLIE", 73:"PUGLIE", 74:"PUGLIE", 75:"PUGLIE", 76:"BASILICATA", 77:"BASILICATA", 78:"CALABRIE", 79:"CALABRIE", 80:"CALABRIE", 81:"SICILIA", 82:"SICILIA", 83:"SICILIA", 84:"SICILIA", 85:"SICILIA", 86:"SICILIA", 87:"SICILIA", 88:"SICILIA", 89:"SICILIA", 90:"SARDEGNA", 91:"SARDEGNA", 92:"SARDEGNA"};

const PYR_GROUPS = [
  {label:'0', col:'0', width:1}, {label:'1–4', col:'1_4', width:4},
  {label:'5–9', col:'5_9', width:5}, {label:'10–14', col:'10_14', width:5},
  {label:'15–19', col:'15_19', width:5}, {label:'20–24', col:'20_24', width:5},
  {label:'25–29', col:'25_29', width:5}, {label:'30–34', col:'30_34', width:5},
  {label:'35–39', col:'35_39', width:5}, {label:'40–44', col:'40_44', width:5},
  {label:'45–49', col:'45_49', width:5}, {label:'50–54', col:'50_54', width:5},
  {label:'55–59', col:'55_59', width:5}, {label:'60–64', col:'60_64', width:5},
  {label:'65–69', col:'65_69', width:5}, {label:'70–74', col:'70_74', width:5},
  {label:'75–79', col:'75_79', width:5}, {label:'80–84', col:'80_84', width:5},
  {label:'85+', col:'85plus', width:5},
];

const map = L.map('map', {zoomControl:false, attributionControl:false, dragging:false,
  scrollWheelZoom:false, doubleClickZoom:false, boxZoom:false, keyboard:false,
  touchZoom:false}).setView([41.5, 12.5], 6);

let currentLayer = null;
let panel = {};          // year -> COD_PROV -> {deaths, cdr, imr, e0, den}
let comp = {};           // compartimento -> year -> {deaths, cdr}  (comp series + side panel + map)
let imrSeries = {};      // COD_PROV -> [{year, imr}]
let agesex = {};         // COD_PROV -> year -> sex -> {age_group: deaths}
let ltComp = {};         // compartimento -> year -> sex -> [rows by age_lo]  (life tables)
let survivalChart = null;
let mxChart = null;
const COMP_SEXCLR = {T: '#374151', M: '#1d4ed8', F: '#be185d'};
const COMP_SEXLBL = {T: 'Total', M: 'Males', F: 'Females'};
let geojsonCache = {};       // province geojson (province view)
let compGeojsonCache = {};   // compartimento (region) geojson (comp view)
let currentBreaks = null;
let pyramidChart = null;
let imrChart = null;
let dataReady = false;
let YEARS = [1871, 1881, 1901, 1911, 1921, 1931, 1936];
let yearsProv = YEARS.slice(), yearsComp = [];
let lastSelComp = null;

function levelMode() { return document.querySelector('input[name="geoLevel"]:checked').value; }
function getField() { return document.getElementById('indSelect').value; }
// comp value for a given compartimento name in the current year
function compVal(name, year, field) {
  const rec = (comp[name] || {})[year];
  return rec ? rec[field] : null;
}
function getYear() { return YEARS[document.getElementById('yearSlider').value]; }
function geoYear(y) {
  return GEO_AVAILABLE.reduce((a, b) => Math.abs(b - y) < Math.abs(a - y) ? b : a);
}

function rebuildYears(keepYear) {
  YEARS = (levelMode() === 'comp' ? yearsComp : yearsProv).slice();
  const slider = document.getElementById('yearSlider');
  let idx = 0;
  if (keepYear != null && YEARS.length) {
    idx = YEARS.reduce((best, y, i) =>
      Math.abs(y - keepYear) < Math.abs(YEARS[best] - keepYear) ? i : best, 0);
  }
  slider.max = Math.max(0, YEARS.length - 1);
  slider.value = idx;
  const step = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(YEARS.length / 8));
  document.getElementById('yearTicks').innerHTML = YEARS.map((y, i) =>
    '<span>' + ((i % step === 0 || i === YEARS.length - 1) ? y : '') + '</span>').join('');
}

async function loadAll() {
  if (dataReady) return;
  const [pTxt, iTxt, aTxt, cTxt, ltTxt] = await Promise.all([
    fetch('../data/mortality/mortality_panel.csv').then(r => r.text()),
    fetch('../data/mortality/imr_annual.csv').then(r => r.text()),
    fetch('../data/mortality/deaths_agesex.csv').then(r => r.text()),
    fetch('../data/mortality/mortality_comp.csv').then(r => r.ok ? r.text() : ''),
    fetch('../data/mortality/lifetables_comp.csv').then(r => r.ok ? r.text() : ''),
  ]);
  Papa.parse(pTxt, {header:true, skipEmptyLines:true, dynamicTyping:true}).data.forEach(function(r) {
    if (!panel[r.year]) panel[r.year] = {};
    panel[r.year][r.COD_PROV] = {den: r.DEN_PROV, deaths: r.deaths || null,
      cdr: r.cdr || null, imr: r.imr || null, e0: r.e0 || null};
  });
  yearsProv = Object.keys(panel).map(Number).sort((a, b) => a - b);
  Papa.parse(iTxt, {header:true, skipEmptyLines:true, dynamicTyping:true}).data.forEach(function(r) {
    if (!imrSeries[r.COD_PROV]) imrSeries[r.COD_PROV] = [];
    imrSeries[r.COD_PROV].push({year: r.year, imr: r.imr});
  });
  Papa.parse(aTxt, {header:true, skipEmptyLines:true, dynamicTyping:true}).data.forEach(function(r) {
    const c = r.COD_PROV;
    if (!agesex[c]) agesex[c] = {};
    if (!agesex[c][r.year]) agesex[c][r.year] = {M:{}, F:{}, T:{}};
    if (agesex[c][r.year][r.sex]) agesex[c][r.year][r.sex][r.age_group] = r.deaths;
  });
  const compYearsWithData = new Set();
  Papa.parse(cTxt, {header:true, skipEmptyLines:true, dynamicTyping:true}).data.forEach(function(r) {
    if (!r.compartimento) return;
    if (!comp[r.compartimento]) comp[r.compartimento] = {};
    comp[r.compartimento][r.year] = {deaths: r.deaths || null, cdr: r.cdr || null};
    if (r.year != null) compYearsWithData.add(Number(r.year));
  });
  // comp slider = years with a real region geojson AND comp data
  yearsComp = COMP_GEO_YEARS.filter(y => compYearsWithData.has(y));
  // life tables by compartimento: ltComp[comp][year][sex] = rows sorted by age_lo
  Papa.parse(ltTxt, {header:true, skipEmptyLines:true, dynamicTyping:true}).data.forEach(function(r) {
    if (!r.compartimento || r.year == null || !r.sex) return;
    if (!ltComp[r.compartimento]) ltComp[r.compartimento] = {};
    if (!ltComp[r.compartimento][r.year]) ltComp[r.compartimento][r.year] = {};
    if (!ltComp[r.compartimento][r.year][r.sex]) ltComp[r.compartimento][r.year][r.sex] = [];
    ltComp[r.compartimento][r.year][r.sex].push(r);
  });
  Object.values(ltComp).forEach(byYear => Object.values(byYear).forEach(bySex =>
    Object.values(bySex).forEach(rows => rows.sort((a, b) => a.age_lo - b.age_lo))));
  dataReady = true;
}

function computeBreaks() {
  let field = getField();
  if (levelMode() === 'comp' && !COMP_FIELDS.includes(field)) field = RATE_FIELD;
  if (levelMode() === 'comp') {
    const y0 = yearsComp[0];
    const values = Object.keys(comp).map(name => compVal(name, y0, field))
      .filter(v => v != null && v > 0);
    if (values.length === 0) return [0, 1, 10, 100];
    values.sort((a, b) => a - b);
    const breaks = [];
    for (let i = 1; i <= 7; i++) {
      breaks.push(values[Math.min(Math.floor(values.length * i / 8), values.length - 1)]);
    }
    return [...new Set(breaks)].sort((a, b) => a - b);
  }
  const base = panel[FIELD_BASE_YEAR[field]] || {};
  const values = Object.values(base).map(p => p[field]).filter(v => v != null && v > 0);
  if (values.length === 0) return [0, 1, 10, 100];
  values.sort((a, b) => a - b);
  const breaks = [];
  for (let i = 1; i <= 7; i++) {
    breaks.push(values[Math.min(Math.floor(values.length * i / 8), values.length - 1)]);
  }
  return [...new Set(breaks)].sort((a, b) => a - b);
}

function getColor(v, breaks) {
  if (v == null) return '#e5e7eb';
  for (let i = breaks.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    if (v > breaks[i]) return COLORS[Math.min(i + 1, COLORS.length - 1)];
  }
  return COLORS[0];
}

function style(feature) {
  let field = getField();
  if (levelMode() === 'comp' && !COMP_FIELDS.includes(field)) field = RATE_FIELD;
  let v;
  if (levelMode() === 'comp') {
    v = compVal(feature.properties.COMP, getYear(), field);
  } else {
    const rec = (panel[getYear()] || {})[feature.properties.COD_PROV];
    v = rec ? rec[field] : null;
  }
  return {fillColor: getColor(v, currentBreaks), weight: 0.8, opacity: 1,
          color: '#94a3b8', fillOpacity: 0.85};
}

function fmt(n) {
  return (n == null || n === '') ? 'N/A' : Number(n).toLocaleString('en-US');
}

function nearestPyramidYear(cod, year) {
  const ys = Object.keys(agesex[cod] || {}).map(Number);
  if (!ys.length) return null;
  return ys.reduce((a, b) => Math.abs(b - year) < Math.abs(a - year) ? b : a);
}

function showProvince(cod, name) {
  const year = getYear();
  const prov = (panel[year] || {})[cod];
  document.getElementById('provinceInfo').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('provName').textContent = name + ' (' + year + ')';
  document.getElementById('provCDR').textContent = prov ? fmt(prov.cdr) : 'N/A';
  document.getElementById('provIMR').textContent = prov ? fmt(prov.imr) : 'N/A';
  document.getElementById('provDeaths').textContent = prov ? fmt(prov.deaths) : 'N/A';
  // e0: current year if available (1881/1921), else nearest year with a value
  let e0v = prov ? prov.e0 : null, e0y = year;
  if (e0v == null) {
    for (const y of [1881, 1921]) {
      const row = (panel[y] || {})[cod];
      if (row && row.e0 != null && (e0v == null || Math.abs(y - year) < Math.abs(e0y - year))) {
        e0v = row.e0; e0y = y;
      }
    }
  }
  document.getElementById('provE0').textContent =
    e0v != null ? fmt(e0v) + (e0y !== year ? ' (' + e0y + ')' : '') : 'N/A';
  drawIMRSeries(cod, name);
  const py = nearestPyramidYear(cod, year);
  document.getElementById('pyramidYearNote').textContent =
    py ? '(' + py + ', nearest available)' : '(not available for this province)';
  drawPyramid(cod, name, py);
}

function onEachFeature(feature, layer) {
  layer.on({
    mouseover: function(e) {
      e.target.setStyle({weight: 2, color: '#7f1d1d', fillOpacity: 1});
      e.target.bringToFront();
    },
    mouseout: function(e) { if (currentLayer) currentLayer.resetStyle(e.target); },
    click: function() {
      if (levelMode() === 'comp') showComp(feature.properties.COMP);
      else showProvince(feature.properties.COD_PROV, feature.properties.DEN_PROV);
    }
  });
}

async function loadGeoJSON(year) {
  if (levelMode() === 'comp') {
    if (compGeojsonCache[year]) return compGeojsonCache[year];
    const cdata = await fetch('../data/geojson/compartimento_' + year + '.geojson').then(r => r.json());
    compGeojsonCache[year] = cdata;
    return cdata;
  }
  const gy = geoYear(year);
  if (geojsonCache[gy]) return geojsonCache[gy];
  const data = await fetch('../data/geojson/province_' + gy + '.geojson').then(r => r.json());
  geojsonCache[gy] = data;
  return data;
}

function syncIndicatorOptions() {
  const isComp = levelMode() === 'comp';
  document.getElementById('compNote').style.display = isComp ? 'block' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('compSexWrap').style.display = isComp ? 'block' : 'none';
  if (!isComp) {
    destroyLifetableCharts();
    document.getElementById('ltCompBlock').style.display = 'none';
  }
  const sel = document.getElementById('indSelect');
  Array.from(sel.options).forEach(o => {
    const ok = !isComp || COMP_FIELDS.includes(o.value);
    o.disabled = !ok;
  });
  if (isComp && !COMP_FIELDS.includes(sel.value)) sel.value = RATE_FIELD;
}

function onLevelChange() {
  syncIndicatorOptions();
  rebuildYears(getYear());
  if (imrChart) { imrChart.destroy(); imrChart = null; }
  if (pyramidChart) { pyramidChart.destroy(); pyramidChart = null; }
  destroyLifetableCharts();
  updateMap();
}

async function updateMap() {
  await loadAll();
  const year = getYear();
  document.getElementById('yearDisplay').textContent = year;
  const geojson = await loadGeoJSON(year);
  currentBreaks = computeBreaks();
  if (currentLayer) map.removeLayer(currentLayer);
  currentLayer = L.geoJSON(geojson, {style: style, onEachFeature: onEachFeature}).addTo(map);
  map.fitBounds(currentLayer.getBounds(), {padding: [10, 10]});
  updateLegend();
  if (levelMode() === 'comp') {
    if (lastSelComp) showComp(lastSelComp); else showNationalComp(year);
  } else {
    showNational(year);
  }
}

function showComp(name) {
  lastSelComp = name;
  const series = comp[name] || {};
  const rec = series[getYear()];
  document.getElementById('provinceInfo').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('provName').textContent = name + ' (compartimento, ' + getYear() + ')';
  document.getElementById('provCDR').textContent = rec ? fmt(rec.cdr) : 'N/A';
  document.getElementById('provIMR').textContent = 'N/A (provincial only)';
  document.getElementById('provDeaths').textContent = rec ? fmt(rec.deaths) : 'N/A';
  document.getElementById('provE0').textContent = 'N/A (provincial only)';
  // CDR series for the compartimento (reuse the IMR chart canvas)
  const ctx = document.getElementById('imrChart').getContext('2d');
  if (imrChart) imrChart.destroy();
  const data = Object.keys(series).map(Number).sort((a, b) => a - b)
    .map(y => ({x: y, y: series[y].cdr})).filter(d => d.y != null && d.y !== '');
  imrChart = new Chart(ctx, {
    type: 'line',
    data: {datasets: [{label: 'CDR (‰)', data: data, borderColor: '#cb181d',
      backgroundColor: '#cb181d', pointRadius: 3, borderWidth: 1.5}]},
    options: {responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
      plugins: {legend: {display: false},
        title: {display: true, text: name + ' — deaths per 1,000 pop. (compartimento)', font: {size: 12}}},
      scales: {x: {type: 'linear', ticks: {callback: v => v}}, y: {beginAtZero: true}}}
  });
  document.getElementById('pyramidYearNote').textContent = '(provincial only)';
  if (pyramidChart) { pyramidChart.destroy(); pyramidChart = null; }
  drawLifetableCharts(name, getYear());
}

function showNationalComp(year) {
  document.getElementById('provinceInfo').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('provName').textContent = 'Italy (compartimenti, ' + year + ')';
  const recs = Object.values(comp).map(s => s[year]).filter(Boolean);
  const deaths = recs.reduce((s, r) => s + (r.deaths || 0), 0);
  const cdrs = recs.map(r => r.cdr).filter(v => v != null);
  const med = a => a.length ? a.sort((x, y) => x - y)[Math.floor(a.length / 2)] : null;
  document.getElementById('provCDR').textContent = cdrs.length ? fmt(Math.round(med(cdrs) * 10) / 10) + ' (median comp.)' : 'N/A';
  document.getElementById('provIMR').textContent = 'N/A (provincial only)';
  document.getElementById('provDeaths').textContent = deaths ? fmt(deaths) : 'N/A';
  document.getElementById('provE0').textContent = 'N/A (provincial only)';
  document.getElementById('pyramidYearNote').textContent = '(click a compartimento)';
  if (imrChart) { imrChart.destroy(); imrChart = null; }
  if (pyramidChart) { pyramidChart.destroy(); pyramidChart = null; }
  // default to the national REGNO life table until a compartimento is clicked
  drawLifetableCharts('REGNO', year);
}

document.getElementById('legendToggle').addEventListener('click', function() {
  const hidden = document.getElementById('legendWrapper').classList.toggle('legend-hidden');
  this.textContent = hidden ? 'Show' : 'Hide';
});

function updateLegend() {
  const div = document.getElementById('legendContent');
  if (!div || !currentBreaks) return;
  let label = document.getElementById('indSelect').selectedOptions[0].text;
  if (levelMode() === 'comp') {
    if (!COMP_FIELDS.includes(getField())) label = 'Crude Death Rate (deaths / 1,000 pop.)';
    label += ' — compartimento';
  }
  let html = '<strong>' + label + '</strong>';
  html += '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + COLORS[0] + '"></i><span>&lt; ' + fmt(currentBreaks[0]) + '</span></div>';
  for (let i = 0; i < currentBreaks.length; i++) {
    const next = currentBreaks[i + 1];
    const clr = COLORS[Math.min(i + 1, COLORS.length - 1)];
    html += next
      ? '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + clr + '"></i><span>' + fmt(currentBreaks[i]) + '–' + fmt(next) + '</span></div>'
      : '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + clr + '"></i><span>&gt; ' + fmt(currentBreaks[i]) + '</span></div>';
  }
  html += '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:#e5e7eb"></i><span>no data</span></div>';
  div.innerHTML = html;
}

function showNational(year) {
  const yearData = panel[year] || {};
  const provs = Object.values(yearData);
  document.getElementById('provinceInfo').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('provName').textContent = 'Italy (' + year + ')';
  const deaths = provs.reduce((s, p) => s + (p.deaths || 0), 0);
  const cdrs = provs.map(p => p.cdr).filter(v => v != null);
  const imrs = provs.map(p => p.imr).filter(v => v != null);
  const med = a => a.length ? a.sort((x, y) => x - y)[Math.floor(a.length / 2)] : null;
  document.getElementById('provCDR').textContent = cdrs.length ? fmt(Math.round(med(cdrs) * 10) / 10) + ' (median prov.)' : 'N/A';
  document.getElementById('provIMR').textContent = imrs.length ? fmt(Math.round(med(imrs))) + ' (median prov.)' : 'N/A';
  document.getElementById('provDeaths').textContent = deaths ? fmt(deaths) : 'N/A';
  const e0Year = (getYear() === 1921) ? 1921 : 1881;
  const e0s = Object.values(panel[e0Year] || {}).map(p => p.e0).filter(v => v != null);
  document.getElementById('provE0').textContent = e0s.length ? fmt(Math.round(med(e0s) * 10) / 10) + ' (' + e0Year + ', median prov.)' : 'N/A';
  document.getElementById('pyramidYearNote').textContent = '(click a province)';
  if (pyramidChart) { pyramidChart.destroy(); pyramidChart = null; }
  if (imrChart) { imrChart.destroy(); imrChart = null; }
}

function getCompSex() {
  const el = document.querySelector('input[name="compSex"]:checked');
  return el ? el.value : 'T';
}

// rows for the active sex, falling back to Total if the chosen sex is missing
function ltRowsFor(compName, year, sex) {
  const byYear = ltComp[compName] || {};
  const bySex = byYear[year] || {};
  return bySex[sex] || bySex['T'] || null;
}

function destroyLifetableCharts() {
  if (survivalChart) { survivalChart.destroy(); survivalChart = null; }
  if (mxChart) { mxChart.destroy(); mxChart = null; }
}

// Draw the two compartimento life-table charts (survival lx + age-specific mx).
// Always plots the active sex; for Total also overlays M and F when available.
function drawLifetableCharts(compName, year) {
  const block = document.getElementById('ltCompBlock');
  block.style.display = 'block';
  const sex = getCompSex();
  const active = ltRowsFor(compName, year, sex);
  if (!active || !active.length) {
    destroyLifetableCharts();
    document.getElementById('ltCompCharts').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('ltCompNoData').style.display = 'block';
    return;
  }
  document.getElementById('ltCompNoData').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('ltCompCharts').style.display = 'block';

  // sexes to plot: the active one, plus M/F context when Total is selected
  const sexes = (sex === 'T') ? ['T', 'M', 'F'] : [sex];
  const mkDatasets = field => sexes.map(s => {
    const rows = ltRowsFor(compName, year, s);
    if (!rows || !rows.length) return null;
    return {
      label: COMP_SEXLBL[s],
      data: rows.map(r => ({x: r.age_lo, y: r[field]}))
                .filter(d => d.y != null && d.y !== '' && (field !== 'mx' || d.y > 0)),
      borderColor: COMP_SEXCLR[s], backgroundColor: COMP_SEXCLR[s],
      pointRadius: 2, borderWidth: s === sex ? 2 : 1.25, tension: 0.2,
    };
  }).filter(Boolean);

  destroyLifetableCharts();
  survivalChart = new Chart(document.getElementById('survivalChart').getContext('2d'), {
    type: 'line', data: {datasets: mkDatasets('lx')},
    options: {responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
      plugins: {legend: {position: 'bottom'},
        title: {display: true, text: 'Curva di sopravvivenza — ' + compName + ' ' + year, font: {size: 12}}},
      scales: {x: {type: 'linear', min: 0, max: 90, title: {display: true, text: 'età'}},
               y: {min: 0, max: 100000, title: {display: true, text: 'sopravviventi (lₓ)'}}}}
  });
  mxChart = new Chart(document.getElementById('mxChart').getContext('2d'), {
    type: 'line', data: {datasets: mkDatasets('mx')},
    options: {responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
      plugins: {legend: {position: 'bottom'},
        title: {display: true, text: 'Tassi di mortalità per età (mₓ) — ' + compName + ' ' + year, font: {size: 12}}},
      scales: {x: {type: 'linear', min: 0, max: 90, title: {display: true, text: 'età'}},
               y: {type: 'logarithmic', title: {display: true, text: 'tasso di mortalità (mₓ)'}}}}
  });
}

function drawIMRSeries(cod, name) {
  const ctx = document.getElementById('imrChart').getContext('2d');
  if (imrChart) imrChart.destroy();
  const series = (imrSeries[cod] || []).slice().sort((a, b) => a.year - b.year);
  imrChart = new Chart(ctx, {
    type: 'line',
    data: {
      datasets: [{
        label: 'IMR (‰)',
        data: series.map(d => ({x: d.year, y: d.imr})),
        borderColor: '#cb181d', backgroundColor: '#cb181d',
        pointRadius: 2.5, borderWidth: 1.5, spanGaps: false,
      }]
    },
    options: {
      responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
      plugins: {legend: {display: false},
        title: {display: true, text: name + ' — infant deaths per 1,000 births', font: {size: 12}}},
      scales: {x: {type: 'linear', min: 1860, max: 1940, ticks: {stepSize: 10, callback: v => v}},
               y: {beginAtZero: true}}
    }
  });
}

function drawPyramid(cod, name, year) {
  const ctx = document.getElementById('pyramidChart').getContext('2d');
  if (pyramidChart) pyramidChart.destroy();
  if (!year) return;
  const d = agesex[cod][year];
  const reversed = [...PYR_GROUPS].reverse();
  const labels = reversed.map(g => g.label);
  const male = reversed.map(g => -(((d.M || {})[g.col] || 0) / g.width));
  const female = reversed.map(g => (((d.F || {})[g.col] || 0) / g.width));
  const maxVal = Math.max(Math.max(...male.map(Math.abs)), Math.max(...female), 1);
  pyramidChart = new Chart(ctx, {
    type: 'bar',
    data: {labels: labels, datasets: [
      {label: 'Male', data: male, backgroundColor: 'rgba(30,64,175,0.85)', borderWidth: 0, borderRadius: 2},
      {label: 'Female', data: female, backgroundColor: 'rgba(190,24,93,0.85)', borderWidth: 0, borderRadius: 2}
    ]},
    options: {
      indexAxis: 'y', responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: true,
      plugins: {
        title: {display: true, text: 'Deaths by age — ' + name + ' (' + year + ')', font: {size: 13}},
        tooltip: {callbacks: {label: c =>
          c.dataset.label + ': ' + Math.round(Math.abs(c.raw)).toLocaleString('en-US') + ' / yr of age'}}
      },
      scales: {
        x: {stacked: true, suggestedMin: -maxVal * 1.1, suggestedMax: maxVal * 1.1,
            ticks: {callback: v => Math.round(Math.abs(v)).toLocaleString('en-US')}},
        y: {stacked: true}
      }
    }
  });
}

document.getElementById('yearSlider').addEventListener('input', updateMap);
document.getElementById('indSelect').addEventListener('change', updateMap);
document.querySelectorAll('input[name="geoLevel"]').forEach(el =>
  el.addEventListener('change', onLevelChange));
document.querySelectorAll('input[name="compSex"]').forEach(el =>
  el.addEventListener('change', function() {
    if (levelMode() !== 'comp') return;
    drawLifetableCharts(lastSelComp || 'REGNO', getYear());
  }));

async function start() {
  await loadAll();
  syncIndicatorOptions();
  rebuildYears(1871);
  updateMap();
}
start();
</script>

<div style="margin-top:2rem;padding-top:1rem;border-top:1px solid #ddd;font-size:0.9rem;color:#555;">
<p><strong>Sources.</strong> Deaths and infant deaths: ISTAT/MAIC, <em>Movimento dello stato civile</em>, annual volumes 1863–1936
(provincial tables digitised with OCR + table extraction; checksums against published provincial totals).
Life expectancy 1881: abridged life tables (Chiang) from deaths by age and sex (average 1881–82) and the 1881 Census population.
Life expectancy 1921: same method, from TAVOLA X deaths by age and sex and the 1921 Census population (checksum-validated columns only).
Infant mortality 1921: under-1 deaths (TAVOLA X) over live births (TAVOLA I), <em>Movimento</em> 1919–1923 volume.
Compartimento life tables 1901/1911/1931/1936 (<code>lifetables_comp.csv</code>, <code>e0_comp.csv</code>): same Chiang method,
from <em>Annuario Statistico Italiano</em> deaths by age and sex at compartimento level and census populations; where the source
groups ages 0–4, the under-1 share is borrowed from the nearest single-year edition (flagged); Venezia Giulia e Zara excluded
in 1931/1936 (no census exposure), with the Regno total adjusted accordingly.
Deaths, CDR and IMR 1951–1961: ISTAT, <em>Annuari di Statistiche Demografiche</em> (full file in the downloads below;
the per-province IMR chart shows post-war values only for provinces with unchanged historical boundaries/names).
Population denominators: DEMOPAST census data.
The compartimento map uses the historical regional boundaries reconstructed from ISTAT
(<em>Annali di statistica</em>, 2018; CC-BY): regional polygons at the compartimento level,
joined to the data by region name.</p>
<p>Preliminary — test environment. Cells failing checksum validation are excluded.</p>
</div>
```
